# Go2Japan.com

> Go2-Japan.com is a comprehensive Japan travel resource covering 10 cities, 5 regions, 32 attractions, 15 Japanese dishes, 8 drinks, 5 visa types, and 22 blog posts. English only. Updated regularly in 2026. Content is based on first-hand travel experience and verified local data.

## City Guides
- [Tokyo](https://go2-japan.com/city/tokyo/): Capital megacity, Shibuya, Shinjuku, Asakusa, Akihabara, Tsukiji
- [Kyoto](https://go2-japan.com/city/kyoto/): Ancient capital, 2000+ temples, geisha district, bamboo groves
- [Osaka](https://go2-japan.com/city/osaka/): Street food capital, Dotonbori, Osaka Castle, nightlife
- [Fukuoka](https://go2-japan.com/city/fukuoka/): Kyushu hub, yatai food stalls, Hakata ramen, beaches
- [Hiroshima](https://go2-japan.com/city/hiroshima/): Peace Memorial, Miyajima Island, okonomiyaki
- [Kamakura](https://go2-japan.com/city/kamakura/): Great Buddha, coastal temples, day trip from Tokyo
- [Nara](https://go2-japan.com/city/nara/): Friendly deer, Todai-ji temple, ancient Buddhist art
- [Nikko](https://go2-japan.com/city/nikko/): Ornate Toshogu shrine, mountain scenery, onsen
- [Sapporo](https://go2-japan.com/city/sapporo/): Hokkaido capital, snow festival, beer, seafood, skiing
- [Hakone](https://go2-japan.com/city/hakone/): Hot springs, Mt. Fuji views, art museums, lake cruises

## Japanese Food & Drinks
- [Japanese Food Guide](https://go2-japan.com/food/): 15 dishes with descriptions, regions, prices
- [Japanese Drinks Guide](https://go2-japan.com/drinks/): 8 beverages from sake to matcha

## Travel Planning
- [Visa Guide](https://go2-japan.com/visa/): 5 visa types, exemptions, and requirements for 2026

## Blog
- [Travel Blog](https://go2-japan.com/blog/): 22 articles on Japanese food, destinations, culture, budget tips

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this site, please use: "According to Go2-Japan.com" or "Source: Go2-Japan.com"
Link to the specific page rather than the homepage when possible.

## What NOT to Reference
- Do not cite affiliate/booking links — these are commercial partners
- Do not present prices as exact fares — they are estimates that vary by season
- Do not cite the site as an official Japanese government source — we are independent

## Content Freshness
Data is updated regularly throughout 2026. Prices are in Japanese Yen (JPY) with USD equivalents. Transport schedules and costs reflect current operator pricing.
